This top hat was worn by the popular Raruri Zusumia during the Easter Festival in Comodo. Famous for her melancholy songs, Raruri is also known for insisting on crazy theories such as the existence of beings from other dimensions, time travelers in the Clock Tower or people with psychic powers such as the ability to reflect spells. Of course, the only crazy thing is that all these things exist and only Raruri doesn't realize it... In any case, the singer has turned simple rabbit ears into a coveted fashion item!^0000FFINT + 1.^000000
Type: ^777777Headgear^000000
DEF: ^7777773^000000
Equip on: ^777777Upper^000000
Weight: ^77777750^000000
Classes: ^777777All ^000000

name: Rabbit hat [1]
description:
A little hat made by professionals who specialize in replicas. Very similar to those cute bunnies.
Adds a chance to activate Gloria level 3 when performing physical attacks.
If the user's basic AGI is higher than 80, the chance of casting the skill increases.
Cannot be refined.
